overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a dark fantasy action RPG showing a hunter character exploring a burning gothic cathedral and adjacent overgrown cemetery at night. The character approaches a flaming building, traverses its candlelit interior, and emerges into a misty garden filled with luminescent flowers and ancient gravestones.

events.description: passing an elderly robed NPC standing beside the stone steps
entering the burning cathedral through the flaming doorway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up wide stone steps toward the flaming cathedral entrance

notable_agents.action: elderly figure in red cloak standing beside the path watching the character approach

entered.detail: large gothic structure engulfed in flames with tall spires and arched windows
large pale moon visible through twisted bare branches
wide cobblestone staircase leading up to the cathedral entrance
gnarled leafless trees surrounding the cathedral approach

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a massive gothic cathedral engulfed in flames under a large full moon. Walking up wide stone steps, the character passes an elderly robed figure standing to the left before reaching the fiery entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic cathedral nave with high vaulted ceilings

events.description: transition from bright flaming exterior to dimly lit candlelit interior
exiting the cathedral through the rear doorway into the garden

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit cathedral hall examining the gothic architecture and furnishings

entered.detail: high wooden beamed ceiling with pointed gothic arches
large ornate fireplace with burning fire and carved stone mantel
tall dark wood shelves filled with books and alchemical items
lit candelabras providing warm flickering illumination
open doorway leading to the garden with light streaming in

segments.scene_description: Inside the cathedral, the character walks through a grand hall with high vaulted wooden ceilings illuminated by candlelight. A large stone fireplace burns on the right, and tall bookshelves line the walls. The character heads toward the rear exit where daylight streams in.

scene_state.functional_zone: ethereal cemetery garden with luminescent flora

events.description: exiting the dark cathedral into the misty garden filled with glowing flowers
approaching and passing through an ornate iron gate at the garden's edge

agents.ego_description: wandering through the ethereal garden examining glowing white flowers and ancient gravestones along the winding path

entered.detail: white glowing flowers covering the ground and emitting soft light
weathered stone grave markers and monuments scattered throughout
wrought iron fence marking the boundary overlooking a bright abyss
low moss-covered stone walls bordering the dirt path
ornate metal gate covered in vines at the garden exit

segments.scene_description: Emerging into a surreal garden, the character walks among luminescent white flowers and ancient tombstones under a dramatic cloudy sky. The path winds past stone walls and weathered monuments toward an iron gate overlooking a bright, misty abyss.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the exterior of a burning gothic cathedral into a surreal, luminescent garden. It begins with the character ascending wide stone steps toward a fiery entrance under a massive full moon, passing a silent, robed figure along the way. As the camera crosses the threshold, the scene shifts into a grand interior hall where the orange glow of a stone fireplace and flickering candlelight illuminate high vaulted ceilings and towering bookshelves. The perspective then moves toward the rear exit, where the warm indoor light gives way to a bright, streaming daylight that leads the character outside. Finally, the environment opens into a misty garden filled with glowing white flowers and ancient tombstones, winding past weathered monuments toward an iron gate overlooking a bright abyss.
